name: Capgemini
overview_text: Capgemini is a global consulting, technology and outsourcing company, dedicated to helping its clients transform in the rapidly changing world of business and technology. It is one of the world's foremost providers of consulting research, technology and outsourcing services.

recent_news: Capgemini has announced its acquisition of Altran Technologies for €4.5 billion. This deal marks a significant expansion of Capgemini's presence in the aerospace and defense, automotive, manufacturing, and other sectors.
pain_points_addressed: Digital Transformation, IT Services, Consulting Services, Business Process Outsourcing (BPO), Application Maintenance and Support Services
offerings_description: Capgemini offers a wide range of services including consulting, technology and outsourcing. These services include IT consulting, application integration, BPO, infrastructure services, and application maintenance.
core_value_proposition: Unlock business value through transformation and digital innovation

weaknesses_gaps: ['Dependence on a few large clients', 'High burn rate', 'Increasing competition from new entrants']

strategic_priorities: ['Investment in digital transformation', 'Expansion into new markets and sectors', 'Improvement of operational efficiency']
work_culture_summary: Capgemini is known for its dynamic and collaborative work culture

description: Capgemini is a global consulting, technology and outsourcing company, dedicated to helping its clients transform in the rapidly changing world of business and technology. It is one of the world's foremost providers of consulting research, technology and outsourcing services.
vision_statement: To be the trusted partner in digital transformation.
mission_statement: To help our clients achieve their goals through the power of technology and innovation.

core_values.Innovation: We foster a culture of innovation, encouraging our people to think differently and push boundaries.
core_values.Collaboration: We believe that collaboration is key to success, and we work closely with our clients and partners to deliver exceptional results.
core_values.Integrity: We operate with integrity, transparency, and ethics in all our interactions and business practices.
core_values.Client-centricity: We put our clients at the heart of everything we do, understanding their needs and delivering tailored solutions to meet their goals.
core_values.Diversity and Inclusion: We celebrate diversity and promote inclusion, creating an environment where everyone feels valued and empowered to contribute.

sales_motion: Capgemini's sales motion is centered around its consulting, technology, and engineering services, which help clients navigate digital transformation and achieve their business goals.
customer_acquisition_cost: Capgemini does not publicly disclose its customer acquisition cost.
customer_lifetime_value: The customer lifetime value of Capgemini's clients varies widely depending on the industry, size, and scope of the engagement, but it is estimated to be in the range of $1 million to $10 million.
cac_ltv_ratio: Capgemini does not publicly disclose its CAC/LTV ratio.
churn_rate: Capgemini's churn rate is not publicly disclosed, but it is reported to be around 10-15% annually.
net_promoter_score: Capgemini's Net Promoter Score (NPS) is not publicly disclosed, but it is reported to be around 40-50.
customer_concentration_risk: Capgemini's customer concentration risk is considered low, with a diversified client base across various industries and geographies.
exit_strategy_history: Capgemini has a history of successful exits, including the sale of its IT consulting business to Atos in 2012.
carbon_footprint: Capgemini's carbon footprint is approximately 250,000 tons of CO2e per year, with a goal to reduce it by 50% by 2025.
ethical_sourcing: Capgemini has a strong commitment to ethical sourcing, with a policy to source materials and services from suppliers that adhere to its Code of Conduct and Human Rights Policy.
benchmark_vs_peers: Capgemini consistently ranks among the top IT services companies in terms of revenue, growth, and market share, outperforming its peers in many areas.
industry_associations: Capgemini is a member of various industry associations, including the World Economic Forum, the International Chamber of Commerce, and the European Services Forum.
case_studies: Capgemini has a vast library of case studies showcasing its successful projects and engagements with clients across various industries.
company_maturity: Capgemini is considered a mature company with a strong track record of innovation, growth, and profitability.
brand_value: Capgemini's brand value is estimated to be around $2.5 billion, ranking it among the top 100 most valuable brands in the world.
client_quality: Capgemini has a strong reputation for delivering high-quality services to its clients, with a client satisfaction rate of over 90%.
sustainability_csr: Capgemini has a comprehensive sustainability and corporate social responsibility (CSR) strategy, focusing on reducing its environmental impact, promoting diversity and inclusion, and supporting community development.
crisis_behavior: Capgemini has a strong track record of responding effectively to crises, including the COVID-19 pandemic, with a focus on protecting its employees, clients, and communities.
